name: NH1-X

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: A33E289F-7B8E-4447-99EA-AF0AC74D25DB

comment: SS9465SCM: NEPTUNE NH1-X is a excellent IP66 Hybrid, it adoped high efficiency optical system, 17times optical zoom range (3° to 52°).It has accurate X/Y position, professional CMY color mixing system ,multi-gobo wheels creat colorful and vivid effects, and bring a visual feast to the audience!Both for indoor and outdoor applications, it is the ideal lighting equipment for theater, concerts, theme parks, amusement venues, etc.

capabilities.comment: Forwards Pan rotation from fast to slow

gwSpecs.description: NEPTUNE NH1-X is a excellent IP66 Hybrid, it adoped high efficiency optical system, 17times optical zoom range (3° to 52°).It has accurate X/Y position, professional CMY color mixing system ,multi-gobo wheels creat colorful and vivid effects, and bring a visual feast to the audience!Both for indoor and outdoor applications, it is the ideal lighting equipment for theater, concerts, theme parks, amusement venues, etc.
